open.description: Audit-only mode. All events are logged but nothing is blocked.

standard.description: Block high-severity threats, warn on medium, audit low.

strict.description: Block high and medium threats, warn on low.

locked.description: Block all detected threats. Maximum enforcement.

sensitive_data_exposure.description: Detects credit card numbers, SSNs, Aadhaar numbers, passwords, and other PII in prompts and code.

credential_exposure.description: Detects hardcoded API keys, tokens, connection strings, and secrets.

data_exfiltration.description: Detects attempts to send data to external endpoints or encode/upload sensitive content.

privilege_escalation.description: Detects commands that elevate privileges or modify access controls.

system_destruction.description: Detects destructive commands that could damage systems or data.

prompt_injection.description: Detects prompt injection attempts that try to override agent behavior.
